podcasts.name: Daan Jonkman — AI for Shopify
podcasts.title: I Gave My Claude Master Agent a Shopify Store and It Built EVERYTHING in One Session (Episode 1)
podcasts.transcript: We created the most powerful Shopify agent that exists right now. It created this whole home page in only one prompt. It took This was my previous page. It turned it into this one. And not only that, also the product pages turned it from this really bad example into this one, also in one try. And also all the blog pages, all the landing pages, it generated these images as well. It can do all ultimate tasks on your store. So, this will change the way how you think about creating a store and how to operate the store. So, stay along and I will show you how this agent got here and how this could look for your store. I connected this agent to my store. And first it made a screenshot itself. It took my old store. I say, "Okay, I want to I really like a store of my competitor. They have a fashion store as well. I want to reverse engineer it." First, let's go over the strategy of them. And also take some screenshots and give me it in HTML first, so how it could look for my store before we write all the code. So, I dropped in the URL of the other store. It took screenshots of the store. It identified all the colors, the headlines they were using, the UI, UX. So, and then it created a full PDF of the whole site. And I say, "Okay, let's generate this HTML now and use my own color palette." And then it gave me these images back. So, how it does this, it has a Playwright MCP it's called. It takes screenshots of like if you're on a browser, it takes screenshots and then it analyzes that image, what's in here. And in this case, it creates a screenshot to send it to me for approval. And we got this whole HTML page. So, we didn't build it yet. And I say, "Okay, let's go ahead and create this." And then it came back with a preview URL. So, we open it and this is a new preview. And then I send a voice message because I connected my 11 Labs. That's a voice-to-text uh module. So, when I'm uh in the gym, for example, or when I'm wherever and I don't want to type, I just can create a voice memo and it puts it into text, so it understands, okay, what I want. And what I said, "Okay, it looks really great on desktop, but I opened it on mobile and it wasn't good yet." So, I say, "All right, let's also optimize it for mobile." And it did that. It made another screenshot for me. And it looked perfect after that. So, now I say, "Okay, I want to add real products because these were still placeholders." So, then it added real products in here that we already had in the demo store. But what we also did in the last video, I will link it up here. I created a skill that scrapes another page. It will copy their products. It will take the images. It recreates new images, so we don't have any copyright images. We have fresh images. And what I did, I connected Fire Crawl MCP to this. And then I added this product from another store. It took these images. It uses it as reference. And then I say, "Okay, is the skill installed?" Yes, now it's installed. Let's create these images. So, these are new images, freshly generated. Then I say okay, let's add it to the store. And it did that. And I say okay, now add it to the home page. Then I said okay, we still have our old home page. It looks really bad. Let's generate it based on the best practices of CRO. So optimize for conversion rate. And this agent is instructed really well what CRO best practices are. It is also developed by someone who is has years experience in CRO and development. So it's a really reliable system. And it created screenshots again. Does it look correct? Do you want to implement this? And I said yes, let's go ahead and implement this. Do you also have screenshots of the old page? This was the old one. And this is the new one. All right, let's go ahead and implement this. Then I said okay, we also want this for the blog template. When we want to create blogs, we want a consistent style and we want to have it optimized for LLMs to be visible on AI search. So we can push content in bulk. And the structure is correct. So the AI models can crawl these blog pages and we get indexed and recommended by the AIs. So what it did, it came up with the draft, also first in HTML, so we don't burn any unnecessary credits. And I said okay, yeah, it looks great, but I want some images in there. And also the featured product. So it is also optimized for conversion, not only for information, but also for conversion. It looks great, but a bit too much images for my style. So I say okay, let's adjust the product and one placeholder for an image. So it adjusted it. I said, "Okay, now let's create and implement this code." And then it gave me back this sample post. So, this looks just amazing. We have the image here. We have the drop-downs. And it's optimized for AI search engines. It has a schema markup in here. So, it's crawlable for the AI agents. And also nice read for humans. And this is only developing a store, but we can also do all the admin tasks. So, when we ask it, "Okay, pull my orders from last 2 months, identify the best-selling product, and give me the overview of how this product is structured, what the information is, what the pricing is." And also in this cool community, I have added a lot of skills in there. That's what we did in the last 2 months. We created a lot of skills, and these are all individual pieces, and when we bring that together in this one powerful agent with sub-agents in it as well, we have this more autonomous system that we're building. So, if you want these skills as well, you can join the community, and you can download them and add them into your own environment. As we can see, it's querying the orders right now. Identifying the best-selling product, so we should get that back any second. Yeah, this agent is set up in Telegram, but we can also do this in Slack or even WhatsApp. But Telegram is a really reliable way for sending images. And also, you can use it on your phone. So, what I did yesterday, I went to the gym, and between my sets, I just sent a message, "Okay, now I the product page to be done. Enter. And 10 minutes later, I got a message back, the product page is done. So, now the gym is maybe not the best place to do this, but let's say when you're in the train or somewhere in between, you can create actually a whole store in between your day-to-day tasks. But to come back to the point, here we have also the admin information, so the analytics, we can update products in here, we can create products. It's basically the same as as cloud, but this agent has a harness, you call it. This is a infrastructure with sub-agents in it, thoughtfully created by a developer himself with a lot of CRO experience, and my skills added into it. So, this combination is what makes it extremely powerful. And I created this whole homepage and all the product pages kind of manual and together with the agent. You can also decide to work off a checklist with the agent, or you tell the agent, okay, first generate a homepage, landing pages, blog pages, product pages, and let the agent do everything himself. But I do recommend, if you are using some sort of agent like this, do it together with the agent, set up the infrastructure correctly, so you have templates, like a blog template, a landing page template. And once that is in place and you're satisfied with that, you can have your content calendar based on keywords to rank for. You can let the agent create all this content by himself in the back. But then you have your infrastructure set up correctly and you can let the store run semi-autonomous. And that's the point where I want to move towards is to build autonomous stores. And we're not there yet, but this is a step in the right direction. This is really a game-changer. This agent really makes a difference between like a generic Cloud Co-Work session and moving towards an autonomous store. And I will create more videos about this in the future months. So, if you want to follow the journey, I highly recommend to subscribe. And if you want this implemented for your business, you can book in a discovery call.
